title: Simple combat
body:
The purpose of this texturepack is to make your game more convenient and simpler.

**Functions**
- ⚒️Simplified models of items.
- ⚔️Shortened models of weapons and tools.
- 🗿Shortened totem.
- 🎃Better visibility from the pumpkin.
- 🔥Low Fire.

**Showcase**
![Textures texture pack Simple combat.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c80fb8c47c2936f2d44ef3b82e02aefe62513c4.png)
